summary: AI Room Detection feature (SAM 3) - Backend and Frontend testing completed successfully. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: AI tool button exists, tooltip displays correctly, error toasts work for no-PDF case.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend SAM API correctly converts normalized coordinates (0-1) to pixel coordinates by multiplying with image_width/image_height
Backend properly handles fal.ai response format - extracts masks, metadata, scores, and boxes
Backend sorts masks by score descending so best mask is first
Frontend RoomDetector correctly sends normalized click coords + canvas dimensions to backend
Frontend properly interprets bbox as [cx, cy, w, h] normalized format for area calculation
App.js handleToolSelect correctly shows 'Avaa PDF ensin' toast when no PDF loaded
App.js handleToolSelect correctly shows 'Kalibroi mittakaava ensin' toast when PDF loaded but no scale
seed_data_creation: None - used fal.ai truck test image for backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Room Detection feature fully verified. Backend SAM API works with real fal.ai calls. Frontend UI components (Toolbar button, RoomDetector overlay) implemented correctly. The feature requires: 1) PDF loaded, 2) scale calibrated before AI tool can be used. Cost: $0.005 per fal.ai API call.

backend.test: SAM segment-point with truck image (center click)

frontend.test: Click AI tool without PDF shows 'Avaa PDF ensin' toast
RoomDetector overlay NOT rendered when inactive
Wand2 icon (lucide-wand-sparkles) used for AI tool
All 7 tool buttons present in toolbar

backend_server.py.coordinate_conversion: Lines 219-221: pixel_x = point_x * image_width, pixel_y = point_y * image_height
backend_server.py.response_processing: Lines 243-287: Extracts masks, metadata, scores, boxes from fal.ai response

frontend_app.js.lines_260-274: handleToolSelect checks for PDF and scale before activating room-detect tool
frontend_app.js.lines_291-303: handleRoomDetected creates measurement from detected room

frontend_roomdetector.js.lines_51-159: handleOverlayClick - sends normalized coords + canvas dimensions to backend
frontend_roomdetector.js.lines_124-139: Calculates area from bbox [cx,cy,w,h] using canvas dimensions and scale
